title: Postmaster A5 C5 Do Not Bend Board Back Envelopes 229 x 162 mm Peel Seal 50 Pack, Brown
features: HARD BOARD-BACKED PROTECTION - Essential for Important Documents such as legal papers, photographs, certificates, passports
C5 ENVELOPE - Designed to take sheets of A4 Paper folded in half, or sheets of A5 paper unfolded. Designed to be sent using a single 1st Class or 2nd Class Stamp (max 100g)
DO NOT BEND - written clearly on the Envelope to help ensure your mail gets couriered through the postal system without being folded or damaged
PEFC-CERTIFIED FOR SUSTAINABILITY - PEFC is a European based Forest certification system, that allows small- and family forest owners to demonstrate their excellence in sustainable forest management
POSTMASTER - we manufacture millions of Envelopes for some of Britain's biggest Organisations as well as for thousands of small, home based businesses
description: From the manufacturer Postmaster Envelopes are PEFC Certified PEFC is a European based Forest certification system, that allows small- and family forest owners to demonstrate their excellence in sustainable forest management Safe & Secure - Card Backed Envelopes Board Backed Envelopes are perfect for adding some protection to important and fragile items such as Photos, Certificates and Important Documents. 50 Pack A5 Board Backed Envelopes 50 Pack A4 Board Backed Envelopes 125 Pack A5 Board Backed Envelopes 125 Pack A4 Board Backed Envelopes Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 836 4.6 out of 5 stars 836 5.0 out of 5 stars 6 4.3 out of 5 stars 75 Price £8.94 £ 8 . 94 — no data £30.42 £ 30 . 42 £20.19 £ 20 . 19 Size A5 A4 A5 A4 Paper Size A4 Folded in half A4 Sheet A4 Folded in half A4 Sheet PEFC Certified ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ DO NOT BEND ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Peel & Seal ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Perfect for the UK Postal System Our A5 Hard Envelopes take a 1st of 2nd Class Stamp Our A4 Hard Envelopes take a 1st of 2nd Class Large Letter Stamp
